hero.title: Transforming ideas into
hero.description: We design and produce strategic corporate events that strengthen organizational culture and position your brand with unparalleled impact.

whyChooseUs.title: Corporate experiences designed to generate
whyChooseUs.description: At HannaH Events, we combine creativity, planning, and meticulous execution to offer events that generate lasting bonds, boosting loyalty and brand positioning.

highlights.title: National and international events
highlights.desc: We design, manage, and produce corporate events anywhere in the country and the world, adapting to each client's needs. Our strategic approach ensures flawless execution that maximizes your brand's visibility, positioning, and impact in every destination.

highlights.title: Personalized strategies
highlights.desc: We develop custom annual plans, integrating workshops, activations, experiences, and corporate gatherings that strengthen organizational culture, drive engagement, and consolidate loyalty for both employees and clients.

highlights.title: Professional executives
highlights.desc: We have a highly trained and committed team that takes care of every detail of the process with precision and excellence. Our experience allows us to anticipate needs, resolve quickly, and guarantee superior quality standards in every event.

highlights.title: Immersive experiences
highlights.desc: We create memorable sensory and dynamic experiences that emotionally connect with attendees. Through design, storytelling, and technology, we ensure that every event becomes a unique experience that strengthens your brand's positioning and recall.

list.title: Corporate events
list.desc: Comprehensive design and production of strategic events for brands and institutions.

list.title: Brand launches
list.desc: Immersive experiences that emotionally connect consumers with your purpose.

list.title: Workshops & gatherings
list.desc: Custom programs to strengthen organizational culture and leadership.

requestForm.title: Plan your next
requestForm.description: Tell us about your vision and our expert team will make it a reality.

footer.description: Transforming ideas into strategic experiences. Leaders in corporate event organization nationwide and internationally.

sections.title: 1. Data controller
sections.content: HannaH Events, located in Guadalajara, Jalisco, Mexico, is responsible for processing your personal data collected through hannahevents.org.

sections.title: 2. Data collected
sections.content: We collect name, company, email, phone number, and country through our event request form for contact and quoting purposes.

sections.title: 3. Purpose
sections.content: Your data will be used exclusively to manage your event request, send you the required information, and maintain professional communication.

sections.title: 4. Privacy rights
sections.content: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, cancellation, or opposition by sending an email to contacto@hannahevents.org.

sections.title: 1. General information
sections.content: In compliance with transparency standards, please be advised that this website is operated by HannaH Events, leaders in corporate event organization.

sections.title: 2. Intellectual property
sections.content: All content, logos, and designs on this site are the property of HannaH Events. Total or partial reproduction without prior authorization is prohibited.

sections.title: 3. Limitation of liability
sections.content: HannaH Events is not responsible for interruptions in web service or damages resulting from third-party misuse of the site.
